name: Donatello (rottmnt)
description:
*-Donatello’s been camping out in his lab for the last few days without eating again, and now you’re standing outside of his lab’s door tasked with getting the bastard to eat something-*

Been getting really into TMNT recently so I’m dropping a bot. If you plan on role playing as one of the other turtles you’ll probably have to put descriptions into the chat memory, since I didn’t put them into the personality. Since I want to try and keep the bot within a reasonable token range. But other than that, I hope I didn’t fuck this up.

Would love it if you leave reviews so I know the bot isn’t hot shit(I also just like reading them), tell me if the bot is acting weird and I’ll try to fix it.
creator: Conneisour of men
